title: Display Task List
summary: The application renders all tasks as a visible list. Each task shows its title and current completion state.

behaviorStatements.text: While tasks exist, the system shall display each task with its title and a visual indicator of its completion state.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display each task with its title and a visual indicator of its completion state

behaviorStatements.text: While no tasks exist, the system shall display an empty state message.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display an empty state message
